title: Mar 18, 2026
summary: New public reference page documenting the Historical M&A Research Database data model.

features.title: Historical M&A Research Database Reference
features.summary: New /ma-research page documenting the 6,100+ deal research database schema, pipeline, and first study
features.description:
Added a static reference page at /ma-research that documents the Historical M&A Research Database -- a 10-year, 6,100+ deal database of U.S.-listed acquisitions (2016-2026). The page requires login (moved from the previous public /research path).

The page displays the complete data model across 7 tables: research_deals (master record with target/acquirer ID, classification, financials, timeline, outcome), research_deal_consideration (versioned bid terms), research_deal_clauses (13 clause categories from go-shop to earnout), research_deal_events (14-category lifecycle event taxonomy), research_deal_filings (SEC cross-references), research_market_daily (stock data + spread analysis), and research_options_daily (IV surface, skew, implied probabilities).

Also shows the data pipeline (EDGAR -> enrichment -> clause extraction -> Polygon -> classification -> features) and the first research study on higher-bid dynamics.

Accessible via a 'Research DB' link in the Event Driven Portfolio tab bar. Uses collapsible sections with color-coded column groups to keep the dense schema navigable. v2 will add interactive data exploration.
